note: P35 plan covered 42 entries. P3 extends to 77 entries (same core + new P49/P1/P29G/P27-orphan/CEO-Decision/active_task/StockPlan/root additions). Same decision: COMMIT_WITH_RETENTION for all outputs; KEEP_IN_PLACE for src/; NEEDS_USER_DECISION for root scripts.

COMMIT_WITH_RETENTION.description: Governance/research artifact — must be committed with its phase group

KEEP_IN_PLACE_SRC.description: src/ files — already in canonical location; commit with their phase

KEEP_IN_PLACE_DATA.description: data/ directories — never move; commit when source authorization lifted

KEEP_IN_PLACE_STOCKPLAN.description: 00-StockPlan/ directories — active plan directories; commit when complete

KEEP_IN_PLACE_GOVERNANCE.description: 00-Plan/roadmap/ files — governance planning docs; commit at end of session

NEEDS_USER_DECISION.description: Root-level scripts (generate_artifacts.py, p28c_9case_validation.js) — may belong in scripts/ or may be obsolete; user must decide relocation or deletion
